title: Why no Acas certificate
h1: Claiming without an Acas early conciliation certificate
legend: Do you have a valid reason why you do not have an Acas early conciliation certificate?
p1: You may be able to make a claim without an Acas certificate.
p2: One of the following reasons must apply as your reason for not having an Acas certificate, including:
li1: you're making a claim with another person who already has an Acas early conciliation number
li2: Acas do not have the power to provide early conciliation on some or all of your claim
li3: the organisations or people you're making a claim against have already been in touch with Acas
li4: you're making an unfair dismissal claim which contains an application for 'interim relief' - this is rare and only applies to certain reasons such as trade union activities, acting as a workers' representative or dismissal after whistleblowing
warningTxt1: If you tell us the wrong exemption (or it does not apply) the tribunal might reject your claim.
insetText1: You’ll need to provide an exemption later as part of your claim. If you’re not sure which one applies contact Acas (opens in new tab).

validNoAcasReason.required: Tell us if you have a valid reason
